narrative:
Van Buren Twp township has 659 registered voters, with 39.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 54.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 48.0 percentage points.
